APPROVE
All four prompt files are authored at the specified paths with the required metaphors (DAG+queue, dual-edge doc graph, three-layer nested execution with dashed worktree, plug-and-socket plugins). DESIGN.md palette and type tokens are consistently injected, and each file carries a sober/utilitarian negative prompt and per-file acceptance criteria.
